metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.count
metrics.description: Count of chargebacks per (status, network, reason_category). Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.pending_evidence
metrics.description: Count of chargebacks stuck in pending_evidence. Sampled every 15 minutes. Feeds the evidence-deadline-approaching alert threshold.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.evidence_submissions_total
metrics.description: Every evidence submission. submission_attempt_number typically 1; 2+ indicates CE3.0 second pass OR bank requested additional evidence.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.evidence_completeness_percent
metrics.description: Distribution of evidence bundle completeness at submission time. P50 target > 75; P90 target > 90.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.evidence_overdue_total
metrics.description: days_remaining IN (7, 3, 1). P2 signal at 7d, P1 at 3d, P0 at 1d.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.evidence_auto_collected_total
metrics.description: CollectChargebackEvidenceJob successful auto-collection runs.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.provider_dispatch_total
metrics.description: SubmitChargebackEvidenceJob outcomes. outcome IN ('sync_success', 'async_processing', 'failed', 'provider_error').

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.provider_dispatch_duration_ms
metrics.description: SubmitChargebackEvidenceJob HTTP call duration. P99 target < 5000ms.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.polls_total
metrics.description: CheckChargebackStatusJob invocations. terminal_state = still_processing / won / lost / provider_error / reference_not_found.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.expired_total
metrics.description: Auto-loss via missed evidence deadline.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.rdr_accepted_total
metrics.description: RDR-accepted chargebacks. Powers RDR-cost-effectiveness analysis (no fee, no rate impact).

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.days_to_decision
metrics.description: outcome IN ('won', 'lost'). Days from filed_at to decision_at.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.losses_total_cents
metrics.description: Sum of amount_cents on lost chargebacks. Financial loss metric.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.network_fees_total_cents
metrics.description: Sum of fee_cents across lost chargebacks. Network fee cost metric.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.provider_errors_total
metrics.description: P1 signal when this counter surges. error_category IN ('network_timeout', 'rate_limit', 'transient_5xx', 'authentication', 'unknown').

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.finalizations_total
metrics.description: success=true when FinalizeChargebackJob completed all 5 steps; false when the chain partial-failed + chargeback stays in terminal with metadata.finalization_error set.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.finalization_failures_total
metrics.description: P1 signal. failure_step IN ('transaction_loss_recorder', 'transaction_fee_recorder', 'invoice_state_updater', 'clawback_coordinator', 'marketing_fire').

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.atomicity.failures_total
metrics.description: CRITICAL. Chargeback transaction atomicity failures. Should stay at 0.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.orphaned_terminal_total
metrics.description: Chargebacks in terminal status ('lost', 'expired') with transaction_id IS NULL OR fee_transaction_id IS NULL. Actionable via chargeback:reconcile admin CLI.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.clawback_referral_total
metrics.description: ChargebackClawbackReferral cascades fired.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.clawback_coupon_total
metrics.description: ChargebackClawbackCoupon cascades fired.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.reconciliations_total
metrics.description: CheckChargebackStatusJob per-chargeback reconciliations. drift_detected=true means the local status differed from provider.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.rate_percent
metrics.description: Current rolling 60-day chargeback rate per network. Updated nightly by MonitorChargebackRateJob.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.rate_threshold_exceeded_total
metrics.description: P1 signal. Rate crossed VDMP/MDMP threshold. Every fire = actionable ops intervention.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.webhooks_received_total
metrics.description: webhook_type IN ('created', 'evidence_received', 'under_review', 'won', 'lost').

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.reconciler_run_duration_ms
metrics.description: CheckChargebackStatusJob total run duration. P99 target < 600000ms (10 min).

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.approvals_notified_total
metrics.description: NotifyChargebackEvidenceOverdueJob per-chargeback defender-notification dispatches.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.notifications_dispatched_total
metrics.description: channel IN ('mail', 'in_app', 'sms', 'push'). category IN ('filed', 'evidence_overdue', 'won', 'lost', 'rate_threshold_exceeded', 'evidence_reminder', 'accepted_refund').

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.retention.purged_total
metrics.description: PurgeExpiredChargebackDataJob emits. entity: 'chargebacks' / 'chargeback_evidence'. destination: 'hard_delete' / 'compliance_archive'.

metrics.name: stackra.chargeback.marketing_events_dispatched_total
metrics.description: How many marketing negative-value + fraud signal events fire per ad-network provider.
